held_out_queries: Can I put my paper on a preprint server before submitting to American Anthropologist, and where?
Can I submit a special section / Vital Topics Forum proposal to AA right now?
If I choose open access at AA, which Creative Commons licenses can I pick, and what file/figure spec rules apply?

edits.summary: Add the AA-specific preprint/sharing route (Wiley 'Does Not Accept Preprints', but submitted version allowed in AAA's Open Anthropology Research Repository), the current pause on special-section / Vital Topics Forum proposals, the OnlineOpen CC license choices (CC BY / CC BY-NC / CC BY-NC-ND), and concrete manuscript/figure file specs (Word, 12pt TNR, double-spaced, endnotes, TIF >=300 dpi). APC amount and editor roster left as live-check.
edits.gate_reason: strict improvement 54 -> 100; judge confirmed zero wrong facts; decision timeline / acceptance rate / reviewer count correctly NOT invented (absent from source map)
